description_long: This vase features a wide, flared rim with an uneven, organic edge, giving it a hand-crafted appearance. The body tapers downward into a rounded, elongated base, and the surface is marked by subtle, irregular textures and earthy color variations. Around the upper section, faint circular motifs or impressions are visible, adding a touch of ornamentation. The coloration is predominantly a warm, natural terracotta with darker patches and lighter highlights, suggesting a fired clay material. The interior is hollow and the opening is large, making it suitable for holding flowers or decorative items. The overall form and finish evoke a rustic, artisanal style, suitable for outdoor or urban decorative use.
description: A rustic, hand-crafted terracotta vase with a flared, uneven rim and subtle circular motifs, featuring earthy color variations and a textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flared rim and the main circular motif near the top, with the vase's full tapering body visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the uneven rim and the depth of the vase, with more pronounced surface texture and color variation.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the hollow interior and the asymmetrical shape of the rim, with less ornamentation visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the rim's irregularity and another angle of the circular motif, with the vase's body curvature evident.
